acp-jsonld.schema.json.title: Web4 ACP — JSON-LD
acp-jsonld.schema.json.description: JSON Schema for ACP (Agentic Context Protocol) documents per web4-standard/core-spec/acp-framework.md. Validates output from AgentPlan.to_jsonld(), Intent.to_jsonld(), Decision.to_jsonld(), ExecutionRecord.to_jsonld(), and cross-language implementations.

authorized.description: LCT IDs authorized to manually trigger.

AgentPlan.title: AgentPlan
AgentPlan.description: Declarative agent workflow specification per ACP §2.1.

Intent.title: Intent
Intent.description: Actionable proposal from plan evaluation per ACP §2.2.

Decision.title: Decision
Decision.description: Human or automated decision on an intent per ACP §2.3.

ExecutionRecord.title: ExecutionRecord
ExecutionRecord.description: Immutable record of action execution per ACP §2.4.

atp-jsonld.schema.json.title: Web4 ATP/ADP — JSON-LD
atp-jsonld.schema.json.description: JSON Schema for ATP/ADP value cycle documents per web4-standard/core-spec/atp-adp-cycle.md. Validates output from ATPAccount.to_jsonld(), TransferResult.to_jsonld(), and cross-language implementations.

ATPAccount.title: ATPAccount
ATPAccount.description: An entity's ATP balance with sub-pool breakdown. Invariant: total = available + locked.

available.description: ATP available for transfer or locking.

initial_balance.description: Balance at account creation, used for recharge calculations.

energy_ratio.description: Computed: total / (total + adp). 0.5 when both zero.

TransferResult.title: TransferResult
TransferResult.description: Outcome of an ATP transfer between accounts.

actual_credit.description: Amount actually credited to receiver (may differ from requested if capped).

overflow.description: Amount returned to sender due to receiver cap. Omitted when zero.

attestation-envelope-jsonld.schema.json.title: Web4 AttestationEnvelope — JSON-LD
attestation-envelope-jsonld.schema.json.description: JSON Schema for spec-compliant AttestationEnvelope documents per docs/specs/attestation-envelope.md. Validates output from AttestationEnvelope.to_jsonld() and cross-language implementations.

entity_id.description: LCT ID of the entity being attested.

public_key.description: Public key in PEM, JWK, or multibase format.

public_key_fingerprint.description: SHA-256 fingerprint of the public key (first 16 hex chars).

format.description: Proof format matching the anchor type.

pcr_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of selected PCR values. TPM2-specific.

pcr_selection.description: PCR register indices included in the quote. TPM2-specific.

client_data_hash.description: Hash of the client data. FIDO2-specific.

timestamp.description: Unix epoch timestamp of attestation creation.

challenge_issued_at.description: Unix epoch timestamp when the challenge was issued.

challenge_ttl.description: Time-to-live for the challenge in seconds.

available.description: Whether platform state information is available.

pcr_values.description: PCR register values as string-keyed hex digests.

trust_ceiling.description: Maximum trust score achievable with this anchor type.

issuer.description: Machine name or instance ID that issued this envelope.

capability-jsonld.schema.json.title: Web4 LCT Capability Levels — JSON-LD
capability-jsonld.schema.json.description: JSON Schema for LCT capability level documents per web4-standard/core-spec/lct-capability-levels.md. Validates output from LevelRequirement.to_jsonld(), capability_assessment_to_jsonld(), and cross-language implementations.

LevelRequirement.title: LevelRequirement
LevelRequirement.description: Human-readable requirements for a capability level.

requirements.description: List of requirements for this level.

trust_range.description: Trust score range [min, max] for this level.

CapabilityAssessment.title: CapabilityAssessment
CapabilityAssessment.description: Result of assessing an LCT's capability level.

level_name.description: Human-readable name for the assessed level.

trust_tier.description: Trust tier label for the assessed level.

trust_range.description: Trust score range for the assessed level.

requirements_met.description: Whether all requirements for the assessed level are met.

missing_requirements.description: Requirements not yet met (empty if requirements_met is true).

CapabilityFramework.title: CapabilityFramework
CapabilityFramework.description: Complete capability level framework with all 6 levels.

dictionary-jsonld.schema.json.title: Web4 Dictionary Entities — JSON-LD
dictionary-jsonld.schema.json.description: JSON Schema for Dictionary Entity documents per web4-standard/core-spec/dictionary-entities.md. Validates output from DictionaryEntity.to_jsonld(), DictionarySpec.to_jsonld(), TranslationResult.to_jsonld(), TranslationChain.to_jsonld(), and cross-language implementations.

AmbiguityHandling.description: How the dictionary resolves ambiguous mappings.

ContextRequired.description: Amount of context required for translation.

DomainCoverage.description: Coverage metrics for a dictionary's domain knowledge.

DictionarySpec.title: DictionarySpec
DictionarySpec.description: Specification defining a dictionary's scope and capabilities (spec §2.2).

bidirectional.description: Whether translation works in both directions.

ChainStep.description: One step in a multi-hop translation chain (spec §4.3).

dictionary_lct_id.description: LCT ID of the dictionary performing this step.

degradation.description: Semantic loss in this step (1 - confidence).

dictionary_lct_id.description: LCT ID of the translating dictionary.

TranslationChain.title: TranslationChain
TranslationChain.description: Multi-hop translation with cumulative degradation tracking (spec §4.3).

length.description: Number of steps in the chain.

DictionaryEntity.title: DictionaryEntity
DictionaryEntity.description: A living semantic bridge with its own LCT and trust profile (spec §2.1).

entity-jsonld.schema.json.title: Web4 Entity Type Taxonomy — JSON-LD
entity-jsonld.schema.json.description: JSON Schema for entity type taxonomy documents per web4-standard/core-spec/entity-types.md. Validates output from EntityTypeInfo.to_jsonld() and cross-language implementations.

BehavioralMode.description: How an entity interacts with the world.

EnergyPattern.description: How an entity participates in ATP/ADP energy metabolism.

EntityType.description: One of the 15 canonical Web4 entity types.

EntityTypeInfo.title: EntityTypeInfo
EntityTypeInfo.description: Behavioral and metabolic metadata for an entity type.

modes.description: Behavioral modes this entity type can exhibit.

can_r6.description: Whether this entity type can process R6 transactions.

EntityTypeRegistry.title: EntityTypeRegistry
EntityTypeRegistry.description: Full registry of all 15 canonical entity types.

lct-jsonld.schema.json.title: Web4 Linked Context Token (LCT) — JSON-LD
lct-jsonld.schema.json.description: JSON Schema for spec-compliant LCT documents per LCT-linked-context-token.md §2.3. Validates output from LCT.to_jsonld() and cross-language implementations.

@context.description: JSON-LD context URIs. First MUST be the LCT context.

subject.description: Entity DID or identifier bound to this LCT.

public_key.description: Public key in multibase or PEM format.

hardware_anchor.description: Hardware anchor reference (EAT token or type identifier).

issuing_society.description: LCT ID of the issuing society.

citizen_role.description: LCT ID of the citizen role.

birth_witnesses.description: List of witness LCT IDs or DIDs.

birth_context.description: Context category: nation, platform, network, organization, ecosystem.

genesis_block_hash.description: Optional genesis block hash for blockchain-anchored births.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last MRH update.

witness.description: DID or LCT ID of the attesting witness.

type.description: Attestation type: existence, trust, quality, action, state, audit, time.

attestations.description: Optional witness attestations. Included only when populated.

parent.description: LCT ID of the parent token.

lineage.description: Optional lineage entries. Included only when populated.

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of revocation (null if active).

composite_score.description: Weighted composite of the three dimensions.

sub_dimensions.description: Optional fractal sub-dimensions per RDF ontology.

computation_witnesses.description: LCT IDs of oracles that computed this tensor.

composite_score.description: Weighted composite of the three dimensions.

sub_dimensions.description: Optional fractal sub-dimensions per RDF ontology.

computation_witnesses.description: LCT IDs of oracles that computed this tensor.

lct.schema.json.title: Linked Context Token (LCT)
lct.schema.json.description: Web4 LCT with birth certificate and role-contextual MRH

subject.description: DID of the entity this LCT represents

issuing_society.description: LCT of the society issuing this birth certificate

citizen_role.description: Citizen role LCT for this entity's context

t3_tensor.description: Trust tensor with 3 canonical root dimensions (Talent/Training/Temperament). Each is an aggregate of an open-ended RDF sub-dimension graph.

v3_tensor.description: Value tensor with 3 canonical root dimensions (Valuation/Veracity/Validity). Follows same fractal sub-dimension pattern as T3.

r7-action-jsonld.schema.json.title: Web4 R7 Action — JSON-LD
r7-action-jsonld.schema.json.description: JSON Schema for spec-compliant R7 Action documents per r7-framework.md. Validates output from R7Action.to_jsonld() and cross-language implementations.

@context.description: JSON-LD context URIs. First MUST be the R7 Action context.

prev_action_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the previous action in the chain (empty if first).

lawHash.description: Hash reference to the authorizing law/policy.

society.description: LCT ID of the governing society.

actor.description: Entity LCT ID of the actor.

subject_lct.description: LCT ID of the entity whose reputation changed.

role_lct.description: Role LCT ID — reputation is role-contextualized.

net_trust_change.description: Sum of all T3 dimension changes.

net_value_change.description: Sum of all V3 dimension changes.

t3v3-jsonld.schema.json.title: Web4 T3/V3 Tensor — JSON-LD
t3v3-jsonld.schema.json.description: JSON Schema for T3Tensor and V3Tensor JSON-LD documents per t3v3-ontology.ttl. Validates output from T3.to_jsonld() and V3.to_jsonld() and cross-language implementations.

dimension_scores.description: Structured dimension scores (web4:hasDimensionScore). At minimum the 3 root T3 dimensions.

entity.description: LCT entity ID this tensor measures (web4:entity).

dimension_scores.description: Structured dimension scores (web4:hasDimensionScore). At minimum the 3 root V3 dimensions.

entity.description: LCT entity ID this tensor measures (web4:entity).

t3v3.schema.json.title: T3/V3 Tensor Updates
t3v3.schema.json.description: Role-contextual trust and value tensor updates

sub_dimensions.description: Domain-specific sub-dimension scores grouped by root dimension. Open-ended — mirrors the web4:subDimensionOf RDF graph.
Domain-specific sub-dimension scores grouped by root dimension

trust-query.schema.json.title: Trust Query Request
trust-query.schema.json.description: ATP-staked request for role-contextual trust information

target_entity.description: Entity whose trust is being queried

requested_role.description: Specific role context for trust query

intended_interaction.description: Type of interaction planned with target

atp_stake.description: ATP amount staked for this query

validity_period.description: Seconds until engagement required or stake forfeited
